Video.summary: Blake meets his match when he steps into the ring to face off against pro wrestling star Shane Haste.
Video.grandparentTitle: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper?
Video.title: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Pro Wrestling

Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Pro Wrestling
